title: atroxima zenkeri
intro: Atroxima zenkeri is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. Atroxima zenkeri has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in the management of respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, its leaves are used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
